Taking Lives (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,682,342Details
International Box Office $31,550,021
Worldwide Box Office $64,232,363
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,458,465 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,705 opening theaters/2,705 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $62,943,770

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 19th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: April 15th, 2004 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: August 17th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong violence including disturbing images, language and some sexuality
Running Time: 102 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Death of a Twin, Faked Pregnancies, Faked Romance, False Identity, FBI, Serial Killer, Surprise Twist, Twins
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Taking Lives Pictures, Inc., Village Roadshow Productions, Mark Canton
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English
